titleStmt.title: SII 6.783: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 783. (A.R. No. 277-B of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākavaruṣaṁbulu 1310 gunēṁṭi kārtika kṛṣṇa daśami
Ādivāraṁnāṁḍu poṭnurivīṭi dāḷēharu[jī(jī)yanaṁ]gāru tamā
ku nabhiṣṭārttasidhigānu śrīnarasiṁhyanāthuniki nityamunnu
mahā caramaṁdu sātta [Oka tiru]tōmāla samarppiṁce vī
ri tammuṁḍu Arijīyana Oka tirutōmāla . Ī Amarujīyana koḍuku sra
gujīyana Oka tirutōmāla . saḷukubhāI Oka tirutōmāla . vī
ri purōhituṁḍu nāraṇabhaṭla cētani AcitabhāI Oka tirutōmala .
madhusudana tiyāḷi Oka tirutōmala Ī Āru tirumālalunnu vīralu tama
ku Abhīṣṭārtthasiddhigānu śrīnarasihanādhunikini mapaṭi dhūpaAvasaramaṁdu
cātanu samarppiṁcciri Iṁdulaku tavapu [Āvarta]maina tōṁṭagaṭulu Āru 6 nu
Anavāla Annumavaśānanu Iciri Iṁdula prasādālakunu Annamacēta
nē pahiṁḍi Icciri Itaṁḍu Ī prasādamu bujiṁci tirutōmālalu Ācaṁdrā
rkastāIgānu peṭṭaṁgalāṁḍu . Ī jīyyanaṁgāri Ācāryyulu dāśōdara Upādhyulu
Oka tirutōmāla samarppiṁcenu Ī māḷapeṭanu bumiAnnama kuṁcaprasādānaku
pahiṁḍi Iciri Ītaṁḍu Ī prasādamu bhujiṁci Ī tirutōmāla Ācaṁdrā
rkastāĪgānu teci peṭaṁgalāṁḍu . Ī dharmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī .
1. On the proper left side of the record is engraved the Vaishnava mark on a pedestal.
Digital edition of SII 6.783 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
